//: ROOT of the site: only the (empty) root toc.yml. In the DocFX modern template the
ROOT toc renders as the horizontal TOP NAVBAR (via docfx:navrel), NOT the left
sidebar. It is kept EMPTY so the navbar carries just the logo/appName, search,
theme toggle, and the auto-detected GitHub link - no section tabs. The whole
section tree lives in the single unified nested toc under guide/ (see below).
LEFT SIDEBAR MECHANISM (verified against generated HTML): the modern template
renders a page's owning toc (docfx:tocrel) in the LEFT SIDEBAR only when it
differs from the root/navbar toc (docfx:navrel). We create that difference for
EVERY page - the home included - by OUTPUTTING all content under guide/ (via
`dest`), beside guide/toc.yml. So each page's nearest toc is the unified guide
toc, which the template puts on the left. A root-level page cannot get a sidebar
(its nearest toc IS the navbar toc), which is why the home is output under guide/
and the output root instead serves a small redirect (see the resource below).
Source files are NOT moved; only output is relocated, so relative links and the
../docs single-sourcing are auto-rewritten by DocFX and keep resolving.
The single UNIFIED nested toc (the LEFT SIDEBAR tree: Home + Server/Client/
Companions groups). Lives at docs-site/guide/ and is mapped WITHOUT `dest` so it
outputs to guide/toc.html - the nested toc that owns every content page below.
(Adding dest here would double the path to guide/guide/toc.html.)
HOME (hero) - output into guide/ so it is owned by guide/toc.html and inherits the
left sidebar. The `_layout: landing` was dropped so it renders in the standard doc
layout with the sidebar present; the hero content is unchanged.

content.//: SERVER group - the two local draft pages, output into guide/server/.

//: SERVER group - single-sourced OhData.AspNetCore guides from ../docs, output into
guide/server/. Everything except the Client pages (client/**), the Companions
pages (openapi/nswag/swashbuckle.md) and the contributor-only releasing.md, which
is intentionally omitted from public nav.
CLIENT group - the single-sourced client guide, split across ../docs/client/*.md,
output into guide/client/ (dest 'guide' preserves the client/ path segment).

content.//: COMPANIONS group - OpenAPI/NSwag/Swashbuckle guides, output into guide/companions/.

//: Site-root redirect. The home (with hero + sidebar) is output at guide/index.html;
this bare meta-refresh page is copied to _site/index.html so the site root bounces
into it. Copied verbatim (resource, not run through the template).
